channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Give Your Phone a Huge (and Free) Upgrade by Switching to Another Keyboard
item.description: Change up the default keyboard in Android and iOS and feel the benefit.

item.title: Feyenoord vs Ajax Live Streams: How to watch Dutch Eredivisie 2025/26 online from anywhere
item.description: All the ways to watch live streams of Feyenoord vs Ajax from anywhere in the world, as De Klassieker takes center stage in the Dutch Eredivisie 2025/26.

item.title: Ce TV Philips OLED Ambilight 144 Hz de 55″ cumule les réductions pour un total de 1 020 € d’économies
item.description: C'est un téléviseur polyvalent qui va régaler aussi bien les cinéphiles que les sérivores et les gamers : le Philips 55OLED850, un modèle OLED 4K de 55 pouces qui revient à 979 euros au lieu de 1 999 euros.

item.title: Meilleurs smartphones haut de gamme 2026 : nos recommandations et tests
item.description: Vous partez en quête du smartphone de vos rêves et vous avez un budget illimité pour vous l'offrir ? Bienvenue sur notre sélection de smartphones haut de gamme, tous testés et approuvés, pour vous aider dans votre choix.

item.title: I asked the cast of Ready or Not 2: Here I Come which David Cronenberg movie you need to stream ASAP — but I totally disagree with their choice
item.description: Every David Cronenberg movie is a certified banger, but if you're going to stream one after Ready or Not 2, don't pick the one that the cast recommends.

item.title: 12 garden gadgets to give your outside space an instant lift — from just £10
item.description: Spring is in the air, and it's time to give your garden some love.

item.title: We gave the 'best-in-class' Insta360 X5 a full five stars out of five — and now it's on sale at Amazon
item.description: The lowest price yet on the five-star rated Insta360 X5 360 action cam – now at Amazon

item.title: Arsenal vs Man City LIVE: Carabao Cup Final 2026 Build-Up, How to Watch & Stream Free
item.description: How to watch Arsenal vs Man City in the Carabao Cup Final 2026 as Mikel Arteta's side look to kickstart their quadruple bid with the opening trophy of the season.

item.title: 12 Best Coffee Subscriptions (2026), Tested by Caffeine Hounds
item.description: These services deliver freshly roasted, delicious coffee picks right to your door—each with its own twist.

item.title: Avis Proton VPN en 2026 : est-ce vraiment le champion de la confidentialité en ligne ?
item.description: Proton VPN fait partie des fournisseurs de VPN les plus réputés du marché, le plus souvent mis en lumière pour sa transparence et sa rigueur sur la protection des données personnelles. Mais la réputation suffit-elle ? Proton VPN peut-il vraiment répondre à vos attentes ? Réponse dans ce test.

item.title: Ondes interdites : SpaceX nous espionne-t-il depuis l’espace ?
item.description: La découverte d’un signal radio inhabituel par le chercheur canadien Scott Tilley a relancé les interrogations sur la multiplication des satellites militaires en orbite basse. En remontant l’origine de cette émission, l’observateur affirme avoir identifié plusieurs satellites liés au programme...

item.title: Speeding drivers, take notice! TfL is rolling out 4K, 4D speed "super" speed cameras with no flash, no lights, no road markings and no sensors
item.description: TfL is trialling 4K, 4D radar cameras across ten London boroughs to monitor more traffic and enforce speed limits.

item.title: IKEA released a smart version of its viral Varmblixt donut lamp — I tried it
item.description: IKEA just launched a new version of its Varmblixt lamp. We went hands-on with the new Matter-over-Thread capable lamp to see how it compares to the OG lamp.

item.title: L’accessoire iPhone le plus cher du monde ? Hermès dévoile son kit MagSafe
item.description: Hermès lance une ligne d'accessoires en cuir pour les chargeurs d'Apple. de 950 euros à près de près de 4000 euros, il n'y en a pas pour toutes les bourses.

item.title: Elon Musk Claims He ‘Would Like to Offer’ to Pay TSA Workers’ Salaries
item.description: President Trump has an alternative plan: Send in ICE.

item.title: Mexico City's 'Xoli' Chatbot Will Help World Cup Tourists Navigate the City
item.description: The launch of “Xoli” adds to the technological efforts promoted by the federal government to turn the 2026 World Cup into an engine of development for the entire country.

item.title: URSP and SD-WAN: Preparing for the future of Network Slicing
item.description: URSP and SD-WAN unlock scalable 5G network slicing.

item.title: Newcastle vs Sunderland Live Streams: How to watch Premier League 2025/26 from anywhere in the world
item.description: All the ways to watch Newcastle vs Sunderland live streams online and from anywhere, with the latest edition of the Tyne-Wear derby scheduled for Sunday.

item.title: This $430 MacBook Pro deal wont stick around for long — act fast to save
item.description: Get a near-mint Apple MacBook Pro for $429.97 (reg. $1,999) — a powerful 13" Retina laptop with 16GB RAM and 1TB SSD.

item.title: 6 AdultFriendFinder features other hookup sites lack
item.description: What features does AdultFriendFinder offer that other hookup sites lack? 6 features that make hooking up easier.

item.title: The Comeback Season 3 review: Lisa Kudrow warns us of the AI apocalypse
item.description: Lisa Kudrow's Valerie Cherish faces off with AI in "The Comeback"s spectacular final season, premiering March 22.

item.title: How to contact Amazon customer service during your Big Spring Sale shopping spree
item.description: Here's how to contact Amazon Customer Service to deal with all of your Big Spring Sale-related questions and beyond.
